units.source_text: 1 包括完成向由Rothesay Life plc和CCF組成的財團出售法國保留房屋及若⼲其他貸款組合後，撥回與該組合相關的15億美元累計公允值虧損。
units.translation_target_text: 1 Includes the reversal of US$1.5 billion of accumulated fair value losses related to the French retained homes and certain other loan portfolios following the completion of the sale to a consortium consisting of Rothesay Life plc and CCF.
units.translation_en: 1 Includes the reversal of US$1.5 billion of accumulated fair value losses related to the French retained homes and certain other loan portfolios following the completion of the sale to a consortium consisting of Rothesay Life plc and CCF.

units.source_text: 2 包括集團於交通銀⾏的持股攤薄所導致的11億美元虧損（包括儲備撥回）。在對集團於交通銀⾏投資的賬⾯值進⾏減值測試後，我們亦在「於聯營公司交通銀⾏權
units.translation_target_text: 2 Including a US$1.1 billion loss (including write-back of reserves) resulting from the dilution of the Group’s shareholding in Bank of Communications. After conducting an impairment test on the book value of the Group’s investment in Bank of Communications, we also conducted an impairment test on the “rights in an associated company, Bank of Communications”.
units.translation_en: 2 Including a US$1.1 billion loss (including write-back of reserves) resulting from the dilution of the Group’s shareholding in Bank of Communications. After conducting an impairment test on the book value of the Group’s investment in Bank of Communications, we also conducted an impairment test on the “rights in an associated company, Bank of Communications”.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: 2 Including a US$1.1 billion loss (including write-back of reserves) resulting from the dilution of the Group’s shareholding in Bank of Communications. After conducting an impairment test on the book value of the Group’s investment in Bank of Communications, we also conducted an impairment test on the “rights in an associated company, Bank of Communications”.

units.source_text: 益的減值虧損」項內確認10億美元減值虧損。請參閱第319⾄322⾴附註18。

units.source_text: 4 包括就Herald Fund SPC在盧森堡地⽅法院提起涉及Bernard L. Madoff Investment Securities LLC詐騙案相關的索償於英國滙豐銀⾏有限公司及控股公司撥備11億
units.translation_target_text: 4 Including a provision of 1.1 billion to HSBC Bank Ltd. and its holding company in the UK in connection with the claims filed by Herald Fund SPC in the Luxembourg District Court involving the Bernard L. Madoff Investment Securities LLC fraud case.
